technical_replicate: The experiments of germination regulator screening and RT-qPCR analysis were carried out at least thrice, each time with at least three replicates.
experimental_design: The experiments of germination regulator screening and RT-qPCR analysis were carried out at least thrice...
factor_value: the expression levels of gapA, ras2, cmk1, pkaA, cre1, and rasA significantly increased, while that of cdc42 significantly decreased, as compared with those of the control group (24 h).
